test_output_snippet: Tests: 24 failed, 1 passed (2 assertions). All 24 failures are pre-existing Breeze auth Feature tests failing with 'table sessions already exists' on SQLite :memory: — a known framework-level issue documented in AGENTS.md. The only passing test is Tests\Unit\ExampleTest.
summary: All 24 failures are pre-existing Breeze auth scaffold tests — not application code. No fixes applied. Manual intervention needed to address the sessions table conflict or exclude Breeze auth tests.
